hypothesis: S186 simulation cap=4 will be confirmed by live SWARM-LANES data. Throughput peaks at 3-5 concurrent lanes.
expect: WIP cap=4 confirmed from live data (n>100 sessions). Throughput peaks at 3-5 concurrent lanes.
methodology: Parse all MERGED DOMEX lanes from SWARM-LANES.md (HEAD). Count unique lanes per session. Cross-reference with git log lesson counts per session. Compute throughput (L/session) and efficiency (L/lane-session) by WIP bucket.

results.finding: Linear throughput scaling with WIP. No elbow. Efficiency monotonically decreasing. S186 cap=4 simulation not confirmed in live data — different WIP level (lanes vs sessions).
results.caveat: n=10 is small. WIP=11 and WIP=15 are single high-concurrency sessions.

verdict: S186 cap=4 PARTIALLY FALSIFIED at lane level. Session-level WIP (L-593) and lane-level WIP are distinct phenomena.
